properties.name_of_weigh_station: Southbound Martin County I-95 Weigh Station
properties.name_of_inspector: Patricia Cabral, Diego Marcentes, Taylor Newsome
properties.GroundsComments:
Landscaping does not meet the desired maintenance conditions. 
Active ant bed.
properties.comments: The facility was in good condition
properties.Creator: Richard.Edwards@dot.state.fl.us_fdot
properties.BuildingsComments: The exterior ceiling needs to be clean.   The exterior lights around the comfort station need to be cleaned. Gutter leaks at the building and the gutter system should be painted to meet desired maintenance conditions. The door to the water treatment room was unlocked. One rolling door to the bay does not open.

properties.name_of_weigh_station: Southbound Martin County I-95 Weigh Station
properties.RestroomComments: Two sensors on the sink faucet area not working ( one in the men’s bathroom and one in the women’s bathroom)
properties.GroundsComments: The landscaping in the comfort area doesn’t meet desired maintenance conditions.  One dead tree.
properties.comments: The weight station was in good condition.
properties.Creator: Richard.Edwards@dot.state.fl.us_fdot
properties.BuildingsComments: The exterior lights around the comfort station need be cleaned.  Gutter leaks at the south end of the building and the gutter system should be painted to meet desired maintenance conditions.

properties.name_of_weigh_station: Southbound Martin County I-95 Weigh Station
properties.RestroomComments: The toilets need to removed stains, The shower water is not coming out evenly.
properties.GroundsComments: One dead tree in front the building. Active bed ant.
properties.comments: The facility was in good condition
properties.Creator: Richard.Edwards@dot.state.fl.us_fdot
properties.BuildingsComments: Gutter leaks at the southbound of the building and the gutter system should be painted to meet desired maintenance conditions.  The exterior lights around the comfort station needs to cleaned.

properties.name_of_weigh_station: Southbound Martin County I-95 Weigh Station
properties.Creator: Richard.Edwards@dot.state.fl.us_fdot
properties.BuildingsComments: The water in the fountain has low pressure.
properties.RoadwayComments: Symbols in a parking  area not meets desired maintenance conditions.

properties.name_of_weigh_station: Southbound Martin County I-95 Weigh Station
properties.InspectionBayComments: The exit door in the inspection bay is malfunctioning it cannot open from inside and needs to be pushed very hard to gets it open.
properties.RestroomComments: The shower in the driver room not working
properties.FamilyRestroomComments: One of the two urinals in the comfort station is not working
properties.GroundsComments: The mowing is not being carried out properly and was pointed out during the inspection.The fence line has vines and invasive  growing on it in several locations.There have been several areas where vegetation is encroaching on to the curb for over 10 continuous feet.
properties.comments: The facility is in good condition.The minor deficiencies were pointed out to JCS for corrective action including edging, mowing and herbicide.
properties.Creator: Richard.Edwards@dot.state.fl.us_fdot
properties.BuildingsComments: One of the lights in the bay is not working
properties.RoadwayComments: There is an area where the bare ground is over the minimum allowed. This is caused by police troopers, but the area needs to be maintain with grass or fillings. This was pointed out during the inspection.

properties.name_of_weigh_station: Southbound Martin County I-95 Weigh Station
properties.RestroomComments: One soap dispenser at men’s bathroom was empty.
properties.GroundsComments: Junction box has a trip hazard.
properties.comments: The weigh station was in good condition

properties.name_of_weigh_station: Southbound Martin County I-95 Weigh Station
properties.comments: The facility is un good condition. The deficiencies were pointed out to Jorgensen to take action.
properties.Creator: Richard.Edwards@dot.state.fl.us_fdot
properties.BuildingsComments: Generator log missing items. Portable water log not legible and difficult to understand. The exit door in the bay is malfunctioning it cannot open from inside needs to be pushed very hard to gets it open, Jorgensen was notified two months ago. Two lights out in the bay area are out. Water fountains with low water pressure.
properties.RoadwayComments:
The symbol meets desired maintenance conditions. 
Loose screws in the junction box.

properties.name_of_weigh_station: Southbound Martin County I-95 Weigh Station

properties.Creator: Richard.Edwards@dot.state.fl.us_fdot
properties.BuildingsComments: The water fountain has low pressure this has been more than 6 inspection.  The gutter leaking. Generator needs replaced air filter and turning on and off at random intervals throughout the day causing it to interrupt or blank out signs and monitors. Exit door in the Bay Area don’t open, this has been more than 6 inspections.  Lights in the comfort area dirty.
properties.RoadwayComments: The bolts in the junction box are losing. Simbol peeling.
